result_summary: Apex A 77.37.76.240, 92.112.198.106; www CNAME www.caminodeldharma.org.cdn.hstgr.net -> 147.79.120.218, 92.112.198.108; AAAA/NS/MX queries timed out

result_summary: http://apex -> 301 https://apex (direct); http://www -> 301 https://www; https://www -> 301 https://apex; https://apex -> 200 HTTP/2. No HSTS on any response. Security headers present on HTTPS. Server hcdn (Hostinger), alt-svc h3
notes: www HTTP entry uses a 2-hop chain (http->https same host, then host canonicalization); each hop is a safe 301 upgrade

result_summary: Let's Encrypt (CN=YE1), CN=caminodeldharma.org, SAN covers apex+www, valid 2026-07-14 to 2026-10-12, TLS 1.3 TLS_AES_256_GCM_SHA384 on both hosts
notes: Both decision-relevant hostnames covered by one current certificate

result_summary: Unknown path returns real 404 with custom page; robots/sitemap/llms 200 with 1h public cache; trailing-slash URLs 301 to slashless canonical; security headers consistent across 200/301/404
notes: Header consistency across status classes supports HSTS readiness

result_summary: robots allows all + sitemap ref; sitemap lists 13 canonical slashless HTTPS URLs with lastmod 2026-07-19; package.json = stylelint only

result_summary: Canonical-host + HTTPS rewrites, DirectorySlash Off, slash/index stripping, legacy-route 301s, 410 for site.webmanifest, mod_expires+mod_headers caching, security headers, HSTS line present but commented (line 103), .htaccess self-denied
notes: Every observed production behavior maps to a rule in this file

result_summary: 13/13 pages HTTP 200; probe URL 404

command_or_method: grep -rn 'http://' excluding schema.org/w3.org/sitemaps.org namespaces and non-deployed dirs

command_or_method: grep for external https domains, googletagmanager, iframe
result_summary: GA4 gtag.js (G-B8FY69RGSS) on all 14 pages line 16; YouTube embeds via www.youtube.com/embed with title+allow attrs (lazy on home); Vimeo player; WhatsApp links; all external refs HTTPS
notes: youtube.com used rather than youtube-nocookie.com; relevant to consent finding PRIV-001

result_summary: Unique titles + descriptions (84-137 chars) on all pages; self-canonicals matching sitemap; single H1 per page; lang=es; og:title/og:image everywhere; 404 is noindex,follow without canonical; JSON-LD on all content pages
notes: Metadata hygiene consistent site-wide

command_or_method: json.loads + required/recommended property checks per type
result_summary: All blocks parse; types: Organization/Person/WebSite/WebPage (home), BreadcrumbList site-wide, Event x2 (all required+recommended props incl. startDate, location, eventStatus, offers), BlogPosting (headline, dates, author), ItemList (videos). Organization lacks only postal address
notes: Syntax validity verified locally; rich-result eligibility not guaranteed by validator success

command_or_method: parse a/img/link/script/source/iframe/audio attributes; resolve against repo files and route set
result_summary: 400 internal references resolve; 0 broken after correcting parser false positives; relative home links ('.', '..', '../..') resolve to / under slashless URLs
notes: First-pass regex over meta content produced false positives; v2 artifact is authoritative

result_summary: .git/* and .htaccess 403; package.json, lockfile, CHANGELOG, README, VERSION, docs/, content-source/, node_modules/, _config.yml, SECURITY.md all 404; site.webmanifest 410 (intentional); directory URLs redirect then 404 (no listing); only assets/fonts/README.md publicly 200
notes: Deployment excludes repo metadata; passive exposure surface minimal

result_summary: llms.txt: structured, es-CO, canonical links matching sitemap, agent guidance section. JS total ~22KB, CSS ~50KB; largest image 332KB; audio 28MB+5.7MB; logo.png 36KB on disk (46KB served)
notes: llms.txt consistent with site structure; no contradictions found

command_or_method: document.cookie, localStorage, consent selector probe after load

profile: desktop 1440x900, no throttling; run1 cold cache, runs 2-3 warm
result_summary: Run1 (cold): TTFB 302ms, DCL 1807ms, load 2078ms, 18 req, 602KB transfer, 3 third-party, FP/FCP/LCP 4852ms (inflated by pane init), CLS 0. Run2 (warm): TTFB 310, load 1412, CLS 0. Run3 (warm): TTFB 170, load 542, CLS 0, longTasks 0
notes: Paint/LCP entries suppressed on warm runs (pane throttling); unthrottled lab environment; not comparable to field CWV

command_or_method: navigation timing + layout metrics + image attribute audit
result_summary: TTFB 306ms, DCL 546ms, load 886ms; no horizontal scroll (scrollWidth 390); CLS 0; 10 imgs: 0 missing dimensions, 0 missing alt
notes: Also EVID for responsive + image hygiene

command_or_method: naturalWidth vs displayed width per img
result_summary: logo.png 1000x1000 displayed 44x44 (46,025 B served content-length; 36,364 B file in repo) (ratio 11.4x); gallery thumbs galeria-01/02/03 1000px displayed 159px (ratio ~3x at DPR2); hero webp 626px at 292px (1.1x, OK); no srcset on any image site-wide
notes: Oversized decoding/transfer for logo and thumbnails; hero properly sized

command_or_method: DOM probes: skip link, landmarks, headings, nav toggle click, aria-expanded
result_summary: Skip link 'Saltar al contenido'->#main; landmarks header/nav/main/footer; 20 headings in coherent H1>H2>H3 order; mobile menu opens with aria-expanded true/false correctly; Escape closes and restores focus (per main.js)
notes: Manual structural a11y checks; no automated axe scan available

result_summary: 23 imgs rendered client-side from embedded JSON (gallery-data), 22 lazy, 0 missing alt; paginated albums with aria-live status, aria-label'd pagination, focus management; no lightbox (by design); page shows no gallery content when JS unavailable and has no noscript fallback
notes: Accessible implementation; JS dependency is the parsability gap (AEO-001)

result_summary: Vanilla JS, defensive guards, native <dialog>, aria-expanded/aria-live/visually-hidden labels, Escape+focus handling; language switcher is UI-only with EN disabled; no form-submit handler anywhere in any script
notes: Absence of a submit handler is decision-relevant for FUNC-001

result_summary: Form has action="#" method="post", labeled inputs (nombre/correo/mensaje) with autocomplete and required, submit button 'Enviar'. No backend endpoint, no JS handler, static host: submission cannot be delivered
notes: Not submitted against production (form_submission_permission=false); conclusion from source + runtime handler absence (EVID-0024)

command_or_method: click calendar button, inspect dialog links; curl status for both .ics URLs
result_summary: Dialog opens (native dialog, focus inside, closes correctly); Google/Outlook URLs correctly built with title/dates/location; Apple Calendar and 'Descargar archivo .ics' point to /ical/encuentro-nacional-2026.ics and /ical/pausa-profunda-cali.ics — both 404 in production and absent from repo (no ical/ directory)
notes: Two of four calendar options broken on both event pages

result_summary: CSS/JS: public max-age=604800; images: 2592000; woff2: 31536000 immutable; nosniff everywhere; JS served as application/x-javascript; no fingerprinting/versioning in asset URLs
notes: Matches .htaccess intent; 7-day CSS/JS cache without cache-busting creates stale window after deploys (PERF-002)

command_or_method: scrollWidth check; WCAG luminance-ratio computation on sampled selectors; bounding boxes of links/buttons
result_summary: No horizontal overflow at 360px; contrast samples: body 4.96:1, buttons/nav 8.31:1, footer 4.64:1 — all >=4.5 AA for normal text; small targets are inline text links only (WCAG 2.5.8 inline exception)
notes: Spot sample, not exhaustive pairs

command_or_method: redirect Location capture with path+query; -L chain count; --compressed; security.txt; STS grep across classes
result_summary: Path+query preserved (http://.../practica?tema=zen&x=1 -> same on https); www-http full chain = 2 redirects to https apex; brotli (content-encoding: br) on HTML; /.well-known/security.txt 404; Strict-Transport-Security absent on 200/301/404 as expected pre-activation
notes: Completes HSTS-TRANSPORT control evidence
